title: Hell's SkyBlockHUD (SBH)
description: Add some in-game hud to enhance visual experience.
body:
This mod _aims_ to **improve** the **visual experience** while playing **Hypixel SkyBlock**.

Some of the planned functions include ~~removing items like coins and bits from the sidebar and placing them visibly on the screen (done)~~. Also adding overlays (near death, frozing, stunned), Slayers Boss Bars, an more.

Currently, this mod contains:
- A **fixed GUI** in the top left that displays the player's skin **face, health bar, mana bar, SkyBlock EXP bar, and SkyBlock level**.
- **Purse** and **Bits** value on screen
- **"Blood" overlay** when near death
- **Slayers Boss Bar** (_Not Blaze and Vampire **YET**_)
